mlkit_advanced_unsupported: Dispositif ya lelo esimbaka ML Kit Advanced te
permission_reason: Mpo na kosala ete lininisa ya sous-titre mpe reconnaissance ya elobeli esalaka malamu, tosengi yo opesa ndingisa oyo elandi:
engine_whisper_desc: Salelá whisper.cpp; nsima ya koyeba nsuka ya fraze, ekokoma fraze mobimba, na retard ya soki 3-5 secondes.
engine_mlkit_basic_desc: Kosalela ML Kit Basic, oyo ezali na ba appareils mingi ya Android 12+.
engine_mlkit_advanced_desc: Pona kosalela ML Kit Advanced, esengeli dispositif oyo esimbaka AICore/Gemini Nano.
cancel_download_title: Confirmer mpo na ko annuler téléchargement
cancel_download_message: Ozali na ntembe te ete olingi koboya kozwa {modèle}? Progrès ya téléchargement ya lelo ekobunga.
delete_model_message: Ozali na ntembe te ete olingi kosilisa {modèle}? Opération oyo ekolongola fichier modèle oyo o téléchargé, mpe ekosenga o télécharger yango lisusu avant osalela yango.
whisper_model: Modèle ya koloba na mongongo ya nse
model_not_downloaded: Modèle yango e téléchargé nanu te
translation_desc: Monoko ya source esalelamaka na ML Kit mpe lisusu na Whisper tango bobongoli efungolami.
translation_enabled_desc: Lakisa source mpe ba sous-titres oyo ebongolami
translation_disabled_desc: Lakisa kaka ba sous-titres ya source
error_missing_projection: Résultat ya ndingisa ya MediaProjection oyo ezangi.
status_preparing: Bongisa ba sous-titres ya mbala moko
status_service_failed: Service ya sous-titre en direct elongi te.
error_projection_token: Ekoki te kozwa jeton ya MediaProjection.
error_no_overlay: Koleka ba applications mosusu epesami nanu nzela te.
error_no_record: Ndingisa ya kokanga mikanda epesami nzela te.
error_no_notification: Ndingisa ya koyebisa epesami nzela te.
error_checksum_failed: Validation ya modèle elongi te: SHA-1 ya {modèle} ekokani te na archive officiel.
error_sha1_mismatch: SHA-1 mismatch, ezelamaki {ezelamaki}, ya solo {ya solo}
mlkit_unsupported: {moteur} esimbaka esaleli to monoko oyo te.
status_running: Ba sous-titres en temps réel ezali kosalama
error_translate_unsupported_lang: ML Kit Translate esimbaka monoko te: {tag}
error_translate_source_unsupported: ML Kit esimbaka monoko ya source te: {tag1} ({tag2})
error_translate_target_unsupported: ML Kit esimbaka monoko ya cible te: {tag1} ({tag2})
